title: scanner.rs: witness update loop full-tree silently continues producing invalid witnesses
description: scanner.rs:472-481 and 485-490 — When witness.append(node) returns Err (tree full at 2^32 leaves) or self.tree.append(node) returns Err, the code logs a warning and continues. After a tree-full condition on self.tree, subsequent note discovery creates witnesses via IncrementalWitness::from_tree(self.tree.clone()). These witnesses are rooted at a tree that can no longer accept new leaves and is inconsistent with the chain. The tx builder will produce proofs against wrong anchors. The 2^32 leaf limit is ~4.3 billion Sapling notes, far beyond current chain state (~tens of millions), but the warning should also set a flag to halt scanning rather than continue producing corrupt witnesses.
